sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15024" key="a)ri/gwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀρίγων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ωνος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, a kind of <sense id="n15024.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">spear,</tr_> Hdn.Gr.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0719.tlg002.perseus-grc1:1:24" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.24</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0719.tlg002.perseus-grc1:2:279" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.279</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
